title: Introduction to Quantum Machine Learning
description: Explore the intersection of quantum computing and machine learning. Learn what QML is, why it matters, and how quantum computers might accelerate learning algorithms.
learningObjectives: Define quantum machine learning and its key concepts
Explain the potential advantages of QML over classical ML
Identify the main paradigms of quantum machine learning
Understand the current state and limitations of QML
Recognize suitable problems for quantum machine learning
